description: Scheduled reminder - training data collection: record simple repetitive work, generate training examples, build dataset, save to training-data/
workflow: 2. Read most recent training example for pattern reference
3. Identify new simple repetitive tasks from recent cron events
4. Generate training examples in JSON format
5. Save to training-data/ with timestamp naming convention
pattern: cron_reminder -> check_directory -> read_latest_example -> identify_tasks -> generate_examples -> save_json

training_value.example_type: self_referential - collecting training data about collecting training data
